No tracks match this criteria.

0 selected
Batch Feedback for Selected Tracks
Missing items
Tap an item to upload it from your phone.
Admin
Import external data for reconciliation. Figures are appended and de-duplicated automatically - safe to re-import an overlapping export.
📊 DistroKid export
From DistroKid Bank → See Excruciating Detail → Download. .csv or .zip accepted.
🎧 Spotify audience export
From Spotify for Artists → Audience export, e.g. "4 The MaXXX-audience-timeline.csv". Artist is read from the filename - don't rename it before sending.
📅 Artist songs (1-day)
A snapshot per song with no date of its own - you'll be asked which date it covers. Upload this one daily for the most accurate figures.
📈 Song timeline
Per-song daily history, e.g. "Shut Up, Boy-timeline.csv". Only fills in days the 1-day snapshot above hasn't covered - that one always takes priority.
